title: Pump Track Builds with Brandon Hetrick
published_title: Pump Track Chat — Pump Track Builds w/ Brandon Hetrick — Hosted by: Kyle A. Huffman
location: On location at a pump-track build; the title materials connect the discussion to Coleman Bike Park / Lebanon County
summary: Brandon Hetrick discusses his background building BMX tracks, skateparks, pump tracks, and event features; community planning; ADA-friendly and adaptive-rider considerations; construction timing; drainage; tourism; local-business effects; and the potential for a Lititz pump track.
historical_significance: Preserves builder testimony used to inform the Warwick Township advocacy effort and documents the practical, recreational, accessibility, and economic dimensions of pump-track development.
transcript_status: Original machine transcript preserved unchanged; corrected machine transcript added separately; audio and speaker verification pending.
rights: All rights reserved unless separately documented; see docs/rights-and-access.md.
notes: Technical estimates and statements remain attributed to Brandon Hetrick and are not municipal engineering findings.
The corrected machine transcript normalizes obvious Lititz, Fulton Bank, and Felicia Stancil references; unresolved wording remains marked or unchanged.
